problem id: 3fdc3de7
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(3) XOR SHR(7)) AND ROT(4)

examples:
  10100110 -> 00100000
  00101111 -> 01110000
  11110010 -> 00000001
  10111000 -> 10000001
  11011101 -> 11001001
  11001011 -> 00011000
  11010001 -> 00001001
  01011101 -> 11000000
  11001110 -> 01100000
  10110101 -> 00001001

query: 11111110
predicted answer: 11100001
